title: User Profile and Login Repair
description: Diagnose profile, sign-in, shell, and recent logon errors before recommending repair or escalation.
starter_prompt: Troubleshoot Windows user profile or login problems safely.

phases.prompt: Scope affected user, sign-in symptom, and whether the machine is domain/Azure AD joined. Keep commands read-only.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; function Section($n){ Write-Output ('== ' + $n + ' ==') }; Section 'Current identity'; whoami /all | Out-String | Write-Output; Section 'Profiles'; Get-CimInstance Win32_UserProfile | Select-Object LocalPath,SID,Loaded,Special,LastUseTime,Status | Format-Table -AutoSize; Section 'Profile service events'; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Application'; ProviderName='Microsoft-Windows-User Profiles Service'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-14)} -MaxEvents 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List; Section 'Shell and logon events'; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-7)} -MaxEvents 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'Winlogon|User32|Shell' } | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List

phases.prompt: Collect read-only profile, identity, and event evidence. Do not edit registry hives or profile folders.
Analyze profile and login evidence. Distinguish corrupt profile, temporary profile, permission, domain/AAD, shell, and storage causes. Recommend only reversible next steps.
Check that no destructive profile, registry, or identity repair is recommended without backup and explicit approval.

Create a technician and customer-ready handoff report with evidence, findings, actions/tools used, verification status, artifacts/logs, cleanup status, residual risk, and prioritized follow-up next actions.
Keep logs and reports. Remove only workflow-created scratch files.

acceptance_criteria: Profile and login evidence are collected read-only.
Recommendations require backup/approval before profile or registry repair.
Domain/Azure AD possibilities are disclosed when evidence is incomplete.
Final report includes evidence, actions, cleanup status, risks, and follow-up items.
